message: Hey, I’m Keiko.  I see you just saw Ms. White.  She is super nice.
Yeah, I wanted to ask her about applying to postsecondary. I have a disability but I’m not sure how that will affect future schooling.
I have a disability too. I have trouble with reading and mathematics.  But I just recently learned what that means.

options.text: That must have been a big moment. Ms. White was really helpful at pointing out resources for me.  Maybe she can help you too?
How was this kept from you for so long?
